configurations.name: invoice-tool
runtimeArgs: cd japanese-invoice-transcriber && uv run --with 'streamlit>=1.35' --with 'anthropic>=0.40.0' --with 'pydantic>=2.0' --with 'python-dotenv>=1.0' --with 'pymupdf>=1.24' --with 'pandas>=2.2' --with 'pyyaml>=6.0' --with 'playwright>=1.45' streamlit run app.py --server.headless=true --server.port 8502
